creator: dhagan@acm.vt.edu
text:
When making the p5-Mysql port, it fails to compile.  --

# cd /usr/ports/databases/p5-Mysql
# make
===>  Building for p5-Mysql-modules-1.2003
cc -c -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.005/i386-freebsd/auto/DBI -I/usr/local/include/mysql -I../dbd  -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.005/i386-freebsd/auto/DBI -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.00502/i386-freebsd -I/usr/local/include -O -pipe     -DVERSION=\"2.0203\"  -DXS_VERSION=\"2.0203\" -DPIC -fpic -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.00502/i386-freebsd/CORE -DDBD_MYSQL -DMyConnect=mysql_dr_connect -DMyLogin=mysql_dr_login dbdimp.c
dbdimp.c: In function `mysql_st_FETCH_internal':
dbdimp.c:1263: `FIELD_TYPE_NEWDATE' undeclared (first use this function)
dbdimp.c:1263: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only once
dbdimp.c:1263: for each function it appears in.)
dbdimp.c:1272: `FIELD_TYPE_YEAR' undeclared (first use this function)
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.

Fix: 

Find appropriate place to define FIELD_TYPE_NEWDATE and FIELD_TYPE_YEAR
and check for other missing definitions of the current port.  No short-term
workaround known.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
(as root)
cd /usr/ports/databases/p5-Mysql
make
